anchor: Google search results are displayed on screen, and the agent has just activated the browser's address bar using Command+L.
question: What is the next meaningful action the agent will likely take in the interface?
reference_answer: Type Sephora's foundation page URL or search query into the address bar and navigate to it
accepted_answers: Type Sephora foundation URL into the address bar
Enter sephora.com/foundation in the address bar
Navigate to Sephora's website by typing the URL
Type a Sephora URL and press Enter

wrong: Click on a Google search result
Apply a filter for sensitive skin
